title: liparis clypeolum
intro: Liparis clypeolum, also known as the helmeted orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Liparis clypeolum include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
